=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies_preview.ts(11,39): warning TS377035: This layer provides A which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)


==== /.src/layerMergeAllWithDependencies_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics layerMergeAllWithDependencies:warning
    import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"
    
    class A extends Context.Service<A>()("A", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    class B extends Context.Service<B>()("B", { make: Effect.as(A, {}) }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    export const preview = Layer.mergeAll(A.Default, B.Default)
                                          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377035: This layer provides A which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll. effect(layerMergeAllWithDependencies)
